title: Unit 5 Checkpoint Quiz — Preterite Tense: Irregular Verbs

questions.prompt: What is the yo preterite of 'ir'?
questions.explanation: The yo preterite of 'ir' is 'fui'. It is identical to the yo preterite of 'ser'. Context tells you which verb is meant.

questions.prompt: Which group do 'tener', 'estar', and 'poder' belong to in the preterite?
questions.explanation: Tener (tuv-), estar (estuv-), and poder (pud-) all have irregular stems ending in -u. They share the same set of endings with no accent marks.

questions.prompt: What is the él/ella preterite of 'hacer'?
questions.explanation: 'Hacer' uses the i-stem 'hic-', but changes c → z before o: él hizo. This preserves the /s/ sound.

questions.prompt: How do you say 'We went to Oaxaca last year'?
options: Fuimos a Oaxaca el año pasado.
Íbamos a Oaxaca el año pasado.
Vamos a Oaxaca el año pasado.
Fueron a Oaxaca el año pasado.
questions.explanation: 'Fuimos' is the nosotros preterite of 'ir'. It's the correct choice for a specific, completed past trip.

questions.prompt: Which is the correct ellos preterite of 'decir'?
questions.explanation: 'Decir' has i-stem 'dij-'. The ellos form is 'dijeron' — note: j-stem verbs drop the i and use -eron not -ieron.

options: I didn't want to go / I refused to go
I used to not want to go
questions.explanation: 'Querer' in the preterite (quise) implies a deliberate choice or refusal, stronger than the imperfect 'quería' (which just describes a want).
The yo preterite of 'dar' is 'di' — no accent mark. It's one of the shortest irregular preterites.

questions.prompt: In Mexican storytelling, irregular preterites are very common. Which sentence is most natural?
options: Fíjate que fui al mercado y me encontré con tu mamá.
Fíjate que iba al mercado y me encontraba con tu mamá.
Fíjate que voy al mercado y me encuentro con tu mamá.
Fíjate que iré al mercado y me encontraré con tu mamá.
questions.explanation: When recounting a specific completed event (a trip to the market and an unexpected encounter), the preterite is the natural choice: fui, encontré.
